mapper.select: SELECT sa.answer_id, #{recordId} as record_id, q.question_id, sa.student_answer, sa.is_correct, q.question_score, sa.student_score, sa.answer_time, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.correct_answer AS standard_answer, q.question_analysis FROM student_exam_record ser JOIN exam e ON ser.exam_id = e.exam_id JOIN exam_question eq ON e.exam_id = eq.exam_id JOIN question q ON eq.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN student_answer sa ON sa.record_id = ser.record_id AND sa.question_id = q.question_id WHERE ser.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY q.question_id
